title: erigeron uniflorus subsp. aragonensis
intro: Erigeron uniflorus subsp. aragonensis, also known as alpine fleabane or alpine daisy, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Erigeron uniflorus subsp. aragonensis can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
